title: Get your Calendly leads instantly to your preferred apps | Leads to CRM

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
This video explains different features of Calendly and how to integrate Calendly with apps like Monday.com, Google sheet, Slack, WhatsApp, CRMs etc.

Here are some of the key features of calendly

  1. Multiple Event Types and Availability
  2. Analytics and Reporting
  3. Ask multiple questions while booking the calender
  4. Integrate payment in your calendar so you can go for paid consultations

Hurry up!! Book your slot now to improve your lead conversion rate:
Calendly - Msquare.

Visit our website to learn more: https://www.msquare.pro/.
